description: Style NoteSporty fashion never looked this good! This pair of performance oriented force 10 shoes is the right choice to complement your casual weekend wear. The brand's shoes have always made the cut when it comes to off-duty dressing - this pair refines that look for you. What's more you can wear this for  fun sporty events as well.Product DetailsWhite round toed shoe with stitch detail on the upperHas central lace-ups and a padded tongue and innerLightweight rubber outsole raised at the heel with curvy lugs all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
